description: Transition from local developer to production-grade ops engineer. This roadmap focuses on absolute mastery of containerization, local orchestration, container scheduling at scale via Kubernetes, and constructing robust, automated CI/CD deployment pipelines targeting cloud environments.

topics.title: Docker Production Mastery
topics.note: Focus on multi-stage builds, minimal production images, secure container runtimes, and local networking patterns.

subtopics.title: Write secure, multi-stage Dockerfiles for Python/Django and React applications to separate build environments from slim runtimes
resources: Docker Official Documentation: Multi-stage builds
Top Practices for Containerizing Python Applications

subtopics.title: Optimize image layers using caching, .dockerignore, and switching to distroless or alpine base images to minimize vulnerability attack surfaces
resources: OWASP Container Security Verification Standard
Google Container Tools: Distroless Images GitHub

subtopics.title: Implement non-root user execution directives inside Docker containers to prevent container-breakout root privileges on the host system
resources: Docker Security Best Practices for Application Developers

subtopics.title: Implement and use Docker health checks for container dependency tracking (e.g., ensuring your database container is healthy before launching backend server process)
resources: Docker Compose specification: Healthcheck instruction

topics.title: Docker Compose Orchestration
topics.note: Replicate complex multi-service production topologies smoothly right on your local workspace computer.

subtopics.title: Architect a multi-container network topology linking React frontend, Django backend, Redis cache, and PostgreSQL database using isolated bridges
resources: Docker Compose Networking Reference Specification

subtopics.title: Manage runtime configurations using environment variable overrides, split compose profiles, and externalized secure secrets mapping
resources: Docker Compose Environment Variables Best Practices

subtopics.title: Configure persistent data volumes with proper host permission mappings to preserve database and Redis states across container restarts
resources: Docker Engine Data Management: Storage Volumes Guide

topics.title: Kubernetes Architecture & Core Objects
topics.note: Move past simple runtime commands to understand container lifecycle orchestration, self-healing, and declared configurations.

subtopics.title: Set up a local multi-node cluster environment using Minikube or Kind to analyze the cluster control plane components
resources: Kubernetes Official Documentation: Setup via Kind/Minikube
Kubernetes Components Architecture Deep-Dive

subtopics.title: Author declarative YAML configurations for Pods, ReplicaSets, and Deployments to specify immutable replica sets and scaling profiles
resources: Kubernetes Core Concept Docs: Deployments & State Management

subtopics.title: Configure internal cluster networking abstractions using ClusterIP, NodePort, and LoadBalancer Service resource definitions
resources: Kubernetes Service Concepts: Connecting Applications

subtopics.title: Configure application settings inside cluster nodes using ConfigMaps and base64-encoded Secrets mounted as runtime volumes
resources: Kubernetes Configuration: Distributing Credentials Securely

topics.title: Advanced Production Kubernetes
topics.note: Gain total mastery over stateful enterprise storage, external traffic ingress rules, and resource quotas.

subtopics.title: Configure an Ingress Controller (e.g., NGINX Ingress) to manage cross-domain routing, path mapping, and automated TLS termination rules
resources: Kubernetes NGINX Ingress Controller Guide

subtopics.title: Deploy stateful datastores to the cluster utilizing PersistentVolumes (PV), PersistentVolumeClaims (PVC), and StatefulSets
resources: Kubernetes Storage Orchestration: Run Stateful Applications

subtopics.title: Enforce explicit resource requests and limits (CPU/Memory) alongside readiness and liveness probes to ensure fault-tolerant self-healing
resources: Managing Compute Resources for Containers in Kubernetes

subtopics.title: Implement Horizontal Pod Autoscaling (HPA) metrics rules to dynamically scale out application replicas under heavy user load spikes
resources: Kubernetes Horizontal Pod Autoscaler Complete Guide

topics.title: CI/CD Pipelines: GitHub Actions
topics.note: Automate linting, testing, image building, and modern continuous integration natively inside your repository engine.

subtopics.title: Construct a matrix-based test automation workflow validating Python and Node unit environments concurrently on pull request triggers
resources: GitHub Actions Documentation: Using Build Matrices

subtopics.title: Implement semantic repository tags checking and automated image pushes directly into target container registries (DockerHub / GitHub Packages)
resources: Publishing Docker Images with GitHub Actions workflows

subtopics.title: Integrate automated static security code scanning (SAST) and container vulnerability scanning tools like Trivy into pipeline workflows
resources: Aquasecurity Trivy GitHub Action Configuration Guide

subtopics.title: Utilize GitHub Environments paired with explicit deployment protection rules and manual review gates for critical staging-to-production promotions
resources: Managing Deployment Environments inside GitHub Actions

topics.title: Self-Hosted Automations: Jenkins
topics.note: Understand standard enterprise automation infrastructure patterns by running, backing up, and orchestration of declarative pipelines.

subtopics.title: Provision a containerized Jenkins server configured with state persistence and attached Docker socket runtimes
resources: Jenkins User Documentation: Installing and Running Docker agent

subtopics.title: Author a declarative structured 'Jenkinsfile' detailing explicit build stages, post-action alerts, and execution environment specifications
resources: Jenkins Pipeline Syntax Reference Guide

subtopics.title: Configure system-wide secure credentials lockers inside Jenkins control panels to cleanly pass secret environment context during steps
resources: Handling Secure Credentials inside Jenkins Pipelines

topics.title: Production Capstone Deployment Goals
topics.note: Synthesize every element from this domain together by deploying your projects through self-healing, automated infrastructure configurations.

subtopics.title: Write complete declarative Kubernetes manifests for your todo tracking application (Frontend, API Backend, DB, Cache) and spin it up completely in a local cluster
resources: Self-Directed Capstone Execution Blueprint

subtopics.title: Build a zero-downtime Continuous Deployment pipeline via GitHub Actions using rolling updates strategy inside your cluster environment
resources: Kubernetes Deployments: Performing a Rolling Update

subtopics.title: Implement centralized cluster metrics collecting by deploying a Prometheus stack with Grafana visualizations showing pod resource health metrics
resources: Prometheus Operator Deployment Guide for Kubernetes Cluster Monitoring
